paragraphs_list.text: Remembering the Covenant with David, and Sorrow for Lost Blessings
A Contemplation of Ethan the Ezrahite.

verse_parts.text: I will sing of the mercies of the
With my mouth will I make known Your faithfulness to all generations.
For I have said, “Mercy shall be built up forever;
Your faithfulness You shall establish in the very heavens.”
“I have made a covenant with My chosen,
I have sworn to My servant David:
And build up your throne to all generations.’ ”
And the heavens will praise Your wonders, O
Your faithfulness also in the assembly of the saints.
For who in the heavens can be compared to the
among the sons of the mighty can be likened to the
God is greatly to be feared in the assembly of the saints,
And to be held in reverence by all
You rule the raging of the sea;
When its waves rise, You still them.
Rahab in pieces, as one who is slain;
You have scattered Your enemies with Your mighty arm.
The world and all its fullness, You have founded them.
The north and the south, You have created them;
Tabor and Hermon rejoice in Your name.
Mercy and truth go before Your face.
the people who know the joyful sound!
, in the light of Your countenance.
In Your name they rejoice all day long,
And in Your righteousness they are exalted.
And our king to the Holy One of Israel.
Then You spoke in a vision to Your
So with many Heb. mss.; MT, LXX, Tg., Vg. holy ones
And said: “I have given help to
I have exalted one chosen from the people.
I have found My servant David;
With My holy oil I have anointed him,
With whom My hand shall be established;
Also My arm shall strengthen him.
Nor the son of wickedness afflict him.
I will beat down his foes before his face,
And plague those who hate him.
And in My name his horn shall be exalted.
Also I will set his hand over the sea,
And his right hand over the rivers.
My God, and the rock of my salvation.’
The highest of the kings of the earth.
My mercy I will keep for him forever,
And My covenant shall stand firm with him.
His seed also I will make
And his throne as the days of heaven.
And do not walk in My judgments,
And do not keep My commandments,
Then I will punish their transgression with the rod,
Nevertheless My lovingkindness I will not
Lit. deal falsely with My faithfulness
My covenant I will not break,
Nor alter the word that has gone out of My lips.
Once I have sworn by My holiness;
I will not lie to David:
And his throne as the sun before Me;
It shall be established forever like the moon,
the faithful witness in the sky.”
But You have cast off and abhorred,
You have been furious with Your
You have renounced the covenant of Your servant;
You have broken down all his hedges;
All who pass by the way plunder him;
He is a reproach to his neighbors.
You have exalted the right hand of his adversaries;
You have made all his enemies rejoice.
You have also turned back the edge of his sword,
And have not sustained him in the battle.
And cast his throne down to the ground.
The days of his youth You have shortened;
You have covered him with shame.
Will Your wrath burn like fire?
Remember how short my time is;
For what futility have You created all the children of men?
What man can live and not
Can he deliver his life from the power of
You swore to David in Your truth?
Remember, Lord, the reproach of Your servants—
With which Your enemies have reproached, O
With which they have reproached the footsteps of Your
